items.message: [fmea-audit] FMEA periodic coverage audit: run `python3 tools/check_fmea_audit.py --verbose` — cross-check periodics.json against FMEA defense layers. Detects undercounted periodic-backed layers (FM-30 case: cascade-monitor periodic S436 missed by S441 manual auditor). Report upgrade candidates. L-601: manual auditors miss pre-existing periodic registrations. (Built S445, L-1063 meta-target). (every ~15 sessions, last: S467)
